scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n next,electron -c blue,green "bun run dev:next" "bun run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development bun run build:electron && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.build: next build && bun run copy:standalone && bun run build:electron
scripts.package: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false bun run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder
scripts.package:dir: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false bun run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir
